fields.name: Maruti Suzuki
fields.description: Maruti Suzuki is India's largest car manufacturer, known for producing affordable and reliable vehicles.

fields.name: Hyundai
fields.description: Hyundai offers a range of stylish and high-quality vehicles, known for their innovative technology and design.

fields.name: Honda
fields.description: Honda is known for its efficient and reliable cars, offering a range of vehicles from compact cars to SUVs.

fields.name: Toyota
fields.description: Toyota is a globally recognized brand known for its durable and high-performance vehicles, including sedans and SUVs.

fields.name: Ford
fields.description: Ford offers a diverse lineup of vehicles, from powerful trucks to fuel-efficient cars, known for their innovation and performance.

fields.name: Nissan
fields.description: Nissan provides a wide range of vehicles with advanced technology and stylish designs, including electric cars and SUVs.

fields.name: BMW
fields.description: BMW is known for its luxury vehicles that combine performance with cutting-edge technology and sophisticated design.

fields.name: Audi
fields.description: Audi offers premium vehicles with advanced features and luxurious interiors, known for their performance and innovation.

fields.name: Mercedes-Benz
fields.description: Mercedes-Benz is a symbol of luxury and performance, providing high-end vehicles with exceptional quality and cutting-edge technology.

fields.name: Volkswagen
fields.description: Volkswagen offers a range of vehicles known for their quality, performance, and distinctive design, including hatchbacks and sedans.

fields.name: Tata Motors
fields.description: Tata Motors is known for its robust and affordable vehicles, ranging from compact cars to heavy-duty trucks and SUVs.

fields.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
fields.description: Mahindra & Mahindra specializes in rugged and versatile vehicles, including SUVs, trucks, and agricultural machinery.

fields.name: Suzuki
fields.description: Suzuki is known for its economical and reliable cars, offering a range of models that cater to different needs and preferences.

fields.name: Kia
fields.description: Kia offers a lineup of modern and stylish vehicles with advanced features and a focus on value for money.

fields.name: Renault
fields.description: Renault is known for its innovative and stylish cars, offering a range of models from compact cars to SUVs and electric vehicles.

fields.name: JLR (Jaguar Land Rover)
fields.description: JLR combines luxury and performance, offering premium vehicles with sophisticated design and advanced technology.

fields.name: Porsche
fields.description: Porsche is renowned for its high-performance sports cars and luxury SUVs, known for their precision engineering and exhilarating driving experience.

fields.name: Hero MotoCorp
fields.description: Hero MotoCorp is a leading motorcycle manufacturer in India, known for its reliable and affordable bikes.

fields.name: Bajaj Auto
fields.description: Bajaj Auto is known for its wide range of motorcycles and scooters, offering performance and value for money.

fields.name: TVS Motor
fields.description: TVS Motor provides a range of motorcycles and scooters known for their reliability, performance, and affordability.

fields.name: Royal Enfield
fields.description: Royal Enfield offers classic and stylish motorcycles, known for their distinctive design and rugged performance.

fields.name: Yamaha Motor
fields.description: Yamaha Motor provides a range of motorcycles and scooters with a focus on performance, style, and innovation.

fields.name: Kawasaki
fields.description: Kawasaki is known for its high-performance motorcycles, offering a range of models from sport bikes to cruisers.

fields.name: Suzuki Motorcycles
fields.description: Suzuki Motorcycles offers a diverse range of bikes known for their performance, reliability, and innovative technology.

fields.name: Aprilia
fields.description: Aprilia is known for its high-performance motorcycles, offering a range of models with advanced technology and cutting-edge design.

fields.name: Ducati
fields.description: Ducati offers premium motorcycles with a focus on performance, innovation, and distinctive Italian design.

fields.name: Benelli
fields.description: Benelli is known for its stylish and high-performance motorcycles, offering a range of models with a unique design.

fields.name: MV Agusta
fields.description: MV Agusta provides high-end motorcycles with a focus on performance, luxury, and Italian craftsmanship.
